content: Telegram enforces rate limits via FLOOD_WAIT_X errors (wait X seconds). GramJS exposes FloodWaitError with a .seconds attribute and auto-sleeps when the wait is under floodSleepThreshold (default ~60s); longer waits are thrown. Best practice: respect the full wait, never tight-retry (repeated retries escalate to longer/permanent lockouts), add randomized delays for bulk operations like messages.Search pagination. Casino media search (paginating history by 100) is the main flood risk in this project.
